title: Chixozhmix's Bard Armor
description: This addon for iron spells and alshanexs familiars will add a new armor to the game - the Bard Armor!
body:
The mod adds a new type of armor to the game - the Bard Armor. This armor was created specifically for the school of music magic from the alshanexs Familiars mod and therefore it increases the power of spells of this school.

![Bard's Armor](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1cfea3ddc706922eb8c631069722a75358b26880.png)


The mod also adds a new item that will allow bards to do what they're supposed to do - inspire allies! With the Heart of a Bard, you can briefly increase the power of the spells of friends around you - they will definitely thank you!

![Bard's heart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a9ad3bfa716da51bc63566c23bdf06b4611e359a.png)

The mod was created specifically for the "Clash of Epochs" modpack, but you can use this mod wherever you want.
